title: Create FO-13 types and constants
description: Create app/fo-13/types.ts with PHASE1_TARGET=20, PHASE2_TARGET=40, PHASE1_BATCH_SIZE=5, PHASE2_BATCH_SIZE=20, FO13_GOAL_QUESTION, and all interfaces (FO13DiscoveryResponse, FO13OnboardingData, FO13GenerateBatchOptions, FO13GenerateBatchResult). Copy FO-12 types, adapt constants.
